channel.title: dotfiles on Fundor333
channel.description: Recent content in dotfiles on Fundor333

item.title: Create a custon Git message with GitConfig
item.description: Sometime you will need to have a template for the commit message. Allways put something (ticket code, bug code, etc…), order of stuff, some command for the CI system, etc… In Git you can set a a file as the template for the git commit. You can do it for a single project or for your user. In this case I will show the command for all your project. First you need to write the file.

item.title: Good Developer Must Be Blogger
item.description: I find the way to become a good programmer: Write a Blog about what are you doing I see more and more good programmers have good blog and good blog about programming have good author. After studing somee good blog and some bad blog I came with this list You need to write a blog about what you know. You must keep it updated. You need to research for it.

item.title: Building My Backend
item.description: More time pass more time I need a server for my cronjob and other process. Sometime the cron was a supid thing, working only for the short period and after can be trashed but the real problem start with Feedly, the subscription for feed I use. One day, adding a new feed to my Feedly account, I discovered that I can’t add more in the free subscription. So I start thinking some alternative.

item.title: Al You Need Is Static
item.description: You don’t need a dinamic site for your company or your blog. You are paing for query when you don’t need them. In the 90% of the situations you don’t need a dinamic web app or other complex things. You need a static site build with a static site generator. Some hystory To understand why in 2020 you need to have a static site and not a dinamic nees some hystory of the HypeText.

item.title: Make a Excel Django combo
item.description: Sometime you need to import “old data” or other type of stuff from an Excel file into your Django and save it in the correct models. This an impossible task without the correct plugin and you need the correct one. I use the pyexcel and pyexcel-xls module for this work. PyExcel is a module where you can import multiple type of file (in our case xls with pyexcel-xls) with one common interface for all the type of files.

item.title: Dotfiles, bot and yaml files
item.description: If you ever use Unix based system you are familiar with dotfiles for configuration. Any program has some of this file or folders laying arrount in your user root. And many time it was a booring job to setup all your stuff before starting with all the work because I want the config to be the same every where I work. So, in the end of the 2017 i find an article about dotfiles: Managing your Dotfiles.

item.title: Sock and socket
item.description: Sometime the life has a distorted sens of humor and make a hole in your sock wen you are going to work. It make feel you strange because you fell it and you only want to pull off both of them but Irony come in your live looking like a mail: Hello we need to connect to [last thing buy for the boss] system for [stuff i don’t understand/like/want] reason so your team need to make a sock to talk with this system.

item.title: Make a Tea Not Big Data
item.description: The story I had different work espiriences with big data and data analysis and so I describe it with tea. This is a personal rant and I will use some personal experience with tea for describe some experiences about data management. Industrial Unamed Tea - Excel file We don’t need to make analisys Boss THE big data for the NEWEST company. You can only use .xls, .xlsx e .

item.title: Mew and programming
item.description: This is a story about a myth about how to find Mew1. In the old day without interent “the cousin of a friends” or a " friend of my cousin find and captured a Mew. The Myth If you want to do it yourself you need to: Have a Pokemon with Surf Have a Pokemon with Strength Have the SS Anne not leave because the player doesn’t have HM01 Cut If you use Surf in the SS Anne map you can go to the track.
